'''yalumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mgf|mgf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mgf|mgf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yalumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yælimith|yælimith]] || [[word:yælimij|yælimij]] || [[word:yælimish|yælimish]] || [[word:yælimi|yælimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yalulumuth|yalulumuth]] || [[word:yalulumuj|yalulumuj]] || [[word:yalulumush|yalulumush]] || [[word:yalulumu|yalulumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yalumuth|yalumuth]] || [[word:yalumuj|yalumuj]] || [[word:yalumush|yalumush]] || [[word:yalumu|yalumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yalufmuth|yalufmuth]] || [[word:yalufmuj|yalufmuj]] || [[word:yalufmush|yalufmush]] || [[word:yalufmuf|yalufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yalumuthu|yalumuthu]] || [[word:yalumuju|yalumuju]] || [[word:yalumushu|yalumushu]] || [[word:yalumuku|yalumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yalumuth|yalumuth]] || [[word:yalumuj|yalumuj]] || [[word:yalumush|yalumush]] || [[word:yalumu|yalumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yalumuthul|yalumuthul]] || [[word:yalumujul|yalumujul]] || [[word:yalumushul|yalumushul]] || [[word:yalumukul|yalumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yalumuthuthu|yalumuthuthu]] || [[word:yalumujuju|yalumujuju]] || [[word:yalumushushu|yalumushushu]] || [[word:yalumuku|yalumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yalumuthun|yalumuthun]] || [[word:yalumujun|yalumujun]] || [[word:yalumushun|yalumushun]] || [[word:yalumukun|yalumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yalumuthuoro|yalumuthuoro]] || [[word:yalumujuoro|yalumujuoro]] || [[word:yalumushuoro|yalumushuoro]] || [[word:yalumukuoro|yalumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
